tableGroups.wordCorrectionHint:
WORD TABLE CORRECTIONS (TABLE_INDENT_FALLBACK strategy):
  Uniform drift of 5.4pt across all 1 columns.
  Root cause unclear (cell padding and table indent do not match drift).
  Fix: reduce Table.LeftIndent by 5.4pt (108 twips).
  This shifts the entire table left as a unit — do NOT apply per word or per phrase.
  Verify: Table.LeftIndent in source .docx = -13.5pt. New value should be -18.9pt.

phraseGroups.phraseText: Please review this Binder of Insurance for accuracy. Please note that this binder contains only a general description
of the coverage provided. For a detailed description of the terms, conditions, exclusions and limitations of this

negativeCorrection.wordCorrectionHint: Table cell: see tableGroups for column/row width correction

phraseGroups.phraseText: insurance, you must refer to the applicable policy form and any endorsements thereto indicated in this binder. If you
require a copy of our policy form or the referenced endorsements, please contact us immediately. If the underwriter
does not hear from you prior to the effective date, it will be assumed that this binder has been accepted as an
accurate description of our agreed upon terms of coverage.
